events: PCE inflation report (Fed preferred gauge) — Thu Jun 25, 8:30am ET
Micron Technology Q3 earnings — Wed Jun 25 after close
FedEx Q4 earnings — Tue Jun 24 after close
rates: elevated and rising expectations — market now pricing ~50bps of Fed hikes by Dec 2026, double two weeks ago
note: Global tech and chip selloff underway this morning. S&P 500 futures down ~1-2%, Nasdaq futures down ~2-3%. Asia led the drop: Korea's Kospi fell 10%+ with a circuit-breaker halt. Drivers: (1) hawkish repricing under new Fed Chair Warsh — rate-hike bets doubled in two weeks; (2) AI/chip valuation doubts on stretched multiples; (3) PCE inflation print due Thu creates additional uncertainty. S&P 500 PE sits at ~25-32x vs historical median ~18x — market remains expensive on any measure. SPY is above its 200-day average (uptrend intact structurally), but today's session opens with a risk-off tone and a live macro catalyst later this week. Cautious posture: demand a wider margin of safety before any new buy.
